step_rationale: Serine protease; extracellular-matrix remodeling and plaque destabilization.
mechanism: CTSA (cathepsin A) degrades fibrous-cap matrix and contributes to plaque instability; targeting it may stabilize lesions post-MI.

references.title: Cathepsin A inhibition attenuates myocardial infarction-induced heart failure on the functional and proteomic levels.
